subcodes.first_line: With the aid of Nasiri’d-Din Sháh and [Sultan] `Abdu’l-`Aziz, Shaykh `Abdu’l-Husayn tried hard to extinguish the light of God’s Cause… Another day in Baghdad, a learned divine came to see Us. He had a tall, heavy frame and thick beard
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @prophecy and fulfillment
